query.queryString:
ItemJobEventLogs
| where Timestamp > ago(6h)
| where ItemKind == 'Pipeline'
| where ItemName == 'pl_p3h_bronze_main'
| where isnotempty(JobStartTime) and isnotempty(JobEndTime)
| extend DurationMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', JobEndTime, JobStartTime)
| where DurationMinutes > 1
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, *) by ItemId, ItemName
| project ItemName, DurationMinutes, JobStartTime, JobEndTime, JobStatus, ExecutingPrincipalId, JobInstanceId

query.queryString:
ItemJobEventLogs
| where Timestamp > ago(6h)
| where ItemKind == 'Pipeline'
| where ItemName == 'pl_p3h_silver_main'
| where isnotempty(JobStartTime) and isnotempty(JobEndTime)
| extend DurationMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', JobEndTime, JobStartTime)
| where DurationMinutes > 20
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, *) by ItemId, ItemName
| project ItemName, DurationMinutes, JobStartTime, JobEndTime, JobStatus, ExecutingPrincipalId, JobInstanceId

ItemJobEventLogs
| where Timestamp > ago(6h)
| where ItemKind == 'Pipeline'
| where ItemName == 'pl_p3h_gold_main'
| where isnotempty(JobStartTime) and isnotempty(JobEndTime)
| extend DurationMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', JobEndTime, JobStartTime)
| where DurationMinutes > 20
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, *) by ItemId, ItemName
| project ItemName, DurationMinutes, JobStartTime, JobEndTime, JobStatus, ExecutingPrincipalId, JobInstanceId
